---
title: "SectorMetrics.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/SectorMetrics.tsx"
loc: 44
complexity: 8
logic_score: 4.72
style_score: 3.59
intel_score: 5.64
overall_score: 5.33
---

## Intent
React component rendering SectorMetrics.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <SectorMetrics /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `SectorMetrics`
- `SectorMetrics`
- `matrix`
- `overall`
- `logic`
- `style`
- `intel`
- `aesthetic`
- `stability`
- `coupling`
- `sovereignty`
- `anomaly`
- `gravity`
- `Metric`
